name: utilities_neighborhoods
query:
select 
  ne.name,
  CAST(COALESCE(SUM(no.stations), 0) AS INTEGER) as number_of_stations,
  CAST(SUM(no.alert) AS INTEGER) as alert,
  sum(no.last_measurements) as last_measurements
from utilities_neighborhoods ne
left join (
    select neighborhoods, count(node_id) stations, sum(cast(pe.alert as int)) as alert, sum(pm.measurement) as last_measurements
    from utilities_nodes no
    left join utilities_edges pe on pe.to_node = no.node_id
    left join (
        select distinct on(sensor_id) *
        from utilities_metrics pm
        order by sensor_id, timestamp desc
    ) as pm on pm.sensor_id = no.name
    group by neighborhoods
) no on no.neighborhoods = ne.name
group by ne.name
order by ne.name
